corpus_description: mneme rust+typescript+python workspace (cli, store, parsers, scanners, mcp, vision)

queries.title: Build pipeline functions
queries.prompt: Find all functions related to building or rebuilding the code graph in this Rust workspace. List each function with its file path and a 1-line description. Cite the actual files you used.

queries.title: Blast radius
queries.prompt: What is the blast radius of changing common/src/paths.rs in this project? List every file that would need to be re-tested or updated if its public API changed. Cite each file with reasoning.

queries.title: Build call graph
queries.prompt: Show me the call graph for the build command in this Rust CLI. Start from cli/src/commands/build.rs and follow every function call until you reach the SQLite layer. Output as an indented tree.

queries.title: Design patterns
queries.prompt: What design patterns are used in this Rust workspace? For each pattern, name it and cite at least one concrete file/function where it appears.

queries.title: Concurrency safety in store
queries.prompt: Find any concurrency or data-race issues in the store crate of this Rust project. For each issue cite the exact file:line and explain the risk concretely (no generic advice).
